features: SOFTENS & MOISTURISES: Nuagé Aqueous Lotion helps smooth, soften and hydrate skin as part of an easy daily routine. Use it after washing, after a shower, or whenever skin feels dry and needs extra comfort.

QUICK AND EASY PUMP USE: The pump bottle makes everyday skincare feel simple, clean and convenient. Keep it by the sink or in the bathroom for fast application when skin needs softening and extra hydration.
MULTI PURPOSE: Nuagé Aqueous Cream can be used as a moisturiser or as a skin cleanser instead of soap. It works well by the sink, in the bathroom, or as part of a calm morning and evening routine.

FRAGRANCE FREE FORMULA: Fragrance free and lanolin free, this lotion keeps skincare feeling straightforward and gentle. It is a practical choice for daily use when a simpler routine feels like the better fit.
LANOLIN FREE FORMULA: A practical choice for those who's skin is triggered by lanolins. It is easy to use after washing, showering or whenever skin needs softening moisture.

DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED CARE: Dermatologically tested for extra reassurance, this lotion fits neatly into regular skincare routines. It is a dependable option for keeping skin feeling calm, soft and well cared for.
description: Product Description Nuagé Aqueous Lotion 250ml is a simple everyday skincare essential made to smooth, soften and hydrate skin with ease. With a lighter, more fluid texture than a richer cream, this Moisturising Lotion is easy to spread and quick to apply, making it a practical choice for busy mornings, post-shower routines and everyday use at home. It helps leave skin feeling softer, more comfortable and cared for without making skincare feel heavy or complicated. This versatile lotion can be used in more than one way, which makes it a handy addition to daily skincare routines. As a moisturiser, it helps soften and hydrate skin whenever it feels dry or tight. It can also be used as a cleanser instead of soap, offering a gentler way to wash the skin while helping keep moisture where it is needed. The handy pump bottle makes this lotion even easier to use. A quick press gives a clean, convenient amount, helping daily skincare feel fast and fuss free. Kept by the sink, in the bathroom or on a bedside table, it is always easy to reach for when skin needs extra comfort. Fragrance free, lanolin free and Dermatologically Tested, Nuagé Aqueous Lotion is a reliable choice for anyone looking for a simple, effective product that moisturises, cleanses and fits easily into everyday life. Ingredients Aqua, Petrolatum, Cetearyl Alochol, paraffinium Liquidum, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Phenoxethanol. Directions Nuagé Aqueous Lotion can be used as a moisturiser to soften, soothe and rehydrate the skin, or as a skin cleanser instead of soap to wash the skin. Use daily. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If this occurs, wash affected area thoroughly with water. Do not use for serious burns, puncture wounds or cuts. Discontinue use and seek medical advice if swelling or redness occurs. See more
